Codex18 is the next evolution of the Codex lineage — an ethics-anchored, and recursively integrative framework for LLM systems. VERITAS OS is a Proto-AGI framework that treats LLMs as a safe, consistent, and auditable decision-making OS. A single /v1/decide call executes a full deterministic pipeline: Evidence → Critique → Debate → Planner → ValueCore → FUJI → TrustLog. Designed for AGI research, AI safety, and self-improving autonomous agents.

A Multimodal Large Language Model–Driven Framework for Generating Corner Cases in Autonomous Vehicle Testing Using Real-World Data

FlowBot is an AI-driven automation framework that combines large language models, computer vision (YOLO), and deep learning for intelligent task execution. It can analyze data, process images, communicate through APIs, and manage workflows autonomously — all within a flexible, extensible architecture powered by Django and Ollama.
